---
id: get-device-bind-result
title: "Query Sub-device Joining Results"
description: "Query the joining results of specified sub-devices. Flexible filtering is supported via `protocols` (protocol types) and `gatewaySubdeviceFilters` (filter conditions for gateways and their sub-devices). Multiple protocols and multiple gateway/sub-device combinations can be queried at the same time."
sidebar_label: "Query Sub-device Joining Results"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Query Sub-device Joining Results"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/gateways/subdevices/bindResult"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Query the joining results of specified sub-devices. Flexible filtering is supported via `protocols` (protocol types) and `gatewaySubdeviceFilters` (filter conditions for gateways and their sub-devices). Multiple protocols and multiple gateway/sub-device combinations can be queried at the same time.   


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["gatewaySubdeviceFilters"],"properties":{"protocols":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"description":"Specifies the protocol types of subdevices to query. If not provided, there is no restriction on protocol types.","items":{"type":"string","enum":["zigbee","matter"]}},"gatewaySubdeviceFilters":{"type":"array","description":"Filters (Gateway ID and Subdevice ID)","required":true,"items":{"type":"object","required":["gatewayId"],"properties":{"gatewayId":{"type":"string","description":"Gateway ID"},"subDeviceIds":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"description":"List of subdevice IDs.\n- If empty or omitted: Query all subdevices under the specified gateway.\n- If not empty: Query the specified subdevices under the specified gateway.\n","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"GatewaySubdeviceDidFilter"}}},"title":"DeviceBindResultRequest"},"examples":{"queryByGatewayAndSubDevices":{"value":{"protocols":["zigbee","matter"],"gatewaySubdeviceFilters":[{"gatewayId":"gateway-001","subDeviceIds":[]},{"gatewayId":"gateway-001","subDeviceIds":["subdevice-001","subdevice-002"]},{"gatewayId":"gateway-002","subDeviceIds":["subdevice-101"]}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
